name: Brightree DME & Home Health Software API
what_it_does: Brightree (ResMed) REST API for durable medical equipment (DME) and home health business management platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient and referral source records, handle equipment orders and delivery logistics, process Medicare and Medicaid DME billing and claims, access prior authorization and eligibility verification, manage resupply and patient compliance workflows, retrieve inventory and rental management data, integrate with payers and manufacturer systems, and connect DME operations with home health and hospice providers.
use_cases: Managing DME orders and delivery logistics from equipment operations agents
Processing Medicare DME billing and prior authorization from revenue cycle agents
Managing patient resupply and compliance from chronic care management agents
Integrating referral source data with CRM from sales management agents
not_for: Retail pharmacy without DME billing and delivery workflows
Hospital inpatient equipment without home-based medical equipment focus
General medical supply without post-acute care setting
best_when: A DME supplier, home oxygen provider, or HME company using Brightree wants AI agents to automate order management, Medicare billing, resupply workflows, and delivery logistics.
avoid_when: HIPAA: DME patient records include PHI and Medicare billing data. Prior authorization automation must maintain clinical accuracy. Medicare DME billing errors can result in claim denials, audits, and exclusion from Medicare.

auth.notes: Brightree uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Company-level credentials with patient, billing, and inventory scopes. ResMed parent company cloud infrastructure. Partner program for technology integrations. FHIR interoperability available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — DME enterprise software pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-company enterprise pricing; ResMed bundle pricing available
pricing.notes: Atlanta, Georgia. Acquired by ResMed 2016. Market leader for DME and HME billing software. Used by home oxygen, CPAP, orthotics, prosthetics, and infusion providers. Strong Medicare DME billing expertise. Competes with HMEsoft and CareTend for DME management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: DME patient and Medicare billing data — BAA required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with enterprise partner program
No webhooks — polling required for order and delivery updates
Medicare DME billing requires strict compliance — billing automation needs clinical review
Prior authorization workflows are state and payer-specific — automation complexity high
ResMed parent company — data infrastructure and roadmap follows ResMed enterprise strategy
agent_readiness.security_notes: DME patient PHI and Medicare billing data. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Medicare billing compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: DME patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Medicare compliance.
